title: deguelia pubinervis
intro: Deguelia pubinervis is a type of plant that belongs to the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the pea family. It is a medicinal plant native to tropical Africa, known for its various health benefits and medicinal properties. The plant is used to treat various ailments, including fever, malaria, and digestive issues, due to its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory properties. Deguelia pubinervis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are believed to provide relief from symptoms and promote overall well-being.
